# remainingComplicationUserInfoTransfers

**Instance Property**

The number of remaining times you can send complication data from the iOS app to the WatchKit extension.

## Declaration

```swift
var remainingComplicationUserInfoTransfers: Int { get }
```

## Discussion

The number of remaining times that you can call [doc://com.apple.watchconnectivity/documentation/WatchConnectivity/WCSession/transferCurrentComplicationUserInfo(_:)] during the current day. If this property is set to 0, any additional calls to [doc://com.apple.watchconnectivity/documentation/WatchConnectivity/WCSession/transferCurrentComplicationUserInfo(_:)] use [doc://com.apple.watchconnectivity/documentation/WatchConnectivity/WCSession/transferUserInfo(_:)] instead.

If the complication is on the active watch face, you are given 50 transfers a day. If the complication is not active, this property defaults to 0.

## Updating Complication Data

- **transferCurrentComplicationUserInfo(_:)**: Sends complication-related data from the iOS app to the WatchKit extension.
